ham.subject: Your CloudSuite Pro subscription is about to expire – Renew now
ham.body:
Hello [Name],

Thank you for using CloudSuite! Yeh ek friendly reminder hai ki aapka CloudSuite Pro subscription 15th April 2026 ko expire ho raha hai. Service mein koi interruption na ho, isliye kripya 10th April 2026 tak apni plan ko renew kar dein.

Aap apni current plan details aur pricing yahan dekh sakte hain: <URL>.

Agar aapko koi confusion ho, to support@cloudsuite.com par email karein.

Regards,
CloudSuite Team

spam.subject: Congratulations! You have been selected for the Merit Scholarship Program
spam.body:
Dear Student,

Aapko batate hue khushi ho rahi hai ki aapko XYZ University ka prestigious Merit Scholarship Program ke liye shortlist kiya gaya hai. Yeh scholarship 100% tuition fees cover karega aur aapko INR 15,000 per month stipend bhi milega.

Is scholarship ko secure karne ke liye, kripya neeche diye gaye documents submit karein:
- PAN card ki copy
- Pichle 3 mahine ka bank statement
- Recent passport-sized photograph

Documents upload karne ke liye yahan click karein: <URL>.

Deadline 5th March 2026 hai. Agar aap is deadline ko miss karte hain, to aapko disqualify kar diya jayega.

Best regards,
Scholarship Committee
XYZ University
